untranslatable_reason: The signal requires put-call ratio (P/(P+C)) which is not in the allowed indicators list. vol_ratio_20 (option volume to stock volume ratio) is a proxy but does not directly measure put-call skew. A true implementation requires custom option-derived indicators tracking put vs call volume/open interest separately.
translation_notes: Attempted mapping: low P/(P+C) ratio (~0.1%) interpreted as vol_ratio_20 < 0.001; high P/(P+C) ratio (~79.7%) interpreted as vol_ratio_20 > 0.797. Exit on next day (hold_days_max=1) with minimal return threshold. Expected return difference of 51 bps noted but not encoded in conditions. This is a partial translation; production implementation should use actual put-call ratio data.
